data.title: Legence Announces Closing of Upsized Secondary Underwritten Public Offering of Class A Common Stock and Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
data.description: Legence Corp. (Nasdaq: LGN) based in SAN JOSE, Calif., disclosed on April 09, 2026, that it successfully completed an expanded secondary underwritten public offering. The offering comprised 15,394,112 shares of its Class A common stock ("Common Stock") sold by affiliated stockholders of Blackstone Inc. at a rate of $54.00 per share. This includes the underwriters exercising their option to buy up to an additional 2,007,927 shares of Common Stock under the same conditions.

data.title: Cars.com Provides Update on Business Initiatives, Raises Share Repurchase Target and Reaffirms Guidance
data.description: In Chicago on April 9, 2026, Cars.com Inc. (NYSE: CARS), a leading technology platform for buying and selling cars, provided an update on its strategic goals outlined in February. The company is focused on leveraging its audience-powered and data-driven approach to streamline the car buying process.

data.title: Crescent Energy Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) will hold a conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. CT on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, to review its first quarter 2026 financial and operating performance. The results will be disclosed after market close on Monday, May 4, 2026, and will be accessible on the company's official website at www.crescentenergyco.com. The conference call is scheduled for 10 a.m. CT (11 a.m. ET) on May 5, 2026.

data.title: HUD‑Supported Breakthrough Regional Pilots Summit Charts a Scalable Path Forward for Offsite Construction and Housing Supply
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Washington, D.C., the National Institute of Building Sciences (NIBS) and MOD X collaborated with the US Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) for the Breakthrough Regional Pilots Summit. This gathering aimed to address key urban housing challenges, with a focus on innovative strategies and solutions. The event brought together professionals and experts to discuss pressing issues and explore new approaches. The NIBS offices served as the venue for this crucial meeting, signaling a commitment to advancing housing initiatives. This initiative signifies a significant step towards enhancing housing policies and urban development, with substantial implications for future projects and programs.

data.title: ASHFORD HOSPITALITY TRUST CONTINUES STRATEGIC PORTFOLIO OPTIMIZATION THROUGH SALE OF SIX HOTELS
data.description: In Dallas on April 9, 2026, Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) reported the completion of the sale of four hotels, with plans to sell two more based on definitive agreements. These transactions are significant moves for the company.

data.title: Illumina to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
data.description: In San Diego on April 9, 2026, Illumina, Inc. reported that they will release their first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The announcement will be made by Jacob Thaysen, PhD, Chief Executive Officer, at 1:30 pm Pacific Time (4:30 pm Eastern Time) on the same day. Illumina, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ILMN.

data.title: OppFi Announces its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 9, 2026, OppFi Inc. (NYSE: OPFI) announced that it will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. OppFi is a prominent digital finance platform collaborating with banks to offer financial solutions to the general public. The company's quarterly report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts as they assess the performance and growth of OppFi during this period. This disclosure is expected to provide valuable insights into the company's revenue, earnings, and overall financial health, which will be crucial in understanding its position in the market. Investors are keen on observing the numbers to make informed decisions regarding their investments in OppFi.

data.title: Clorox Announces April 30 Webcast of Third-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: Oakland, California - On April 9, 2026, The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) announced that it will release its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results on April 30, 2026. The announcement schedule is set as follows: 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET for the publication of the press release and prepared management remarks.

data.title: NMG Announces US$297 Million Equity Financing Package including US$213 Million Private Placement and US$84 Million Bought Deal Public Offering, Advancing Phase-2 Matawinie Mine toward FID
data.description: The base shelf prospectus has been made available and the shelf prospectus supplement will be accessible on SEDAR+ and EDGAR within the next two business days. This filing will provide important information for investors and stakeholders, including key financial data and updates on the company's activities. Investors are encouraged to review these documents for a comprehensive understanding of the organization's current standing and future prospects. Stay tuned for further updates on this development.

data.title: AutoNation Service Experts Share Preventive Maintenance Tips To Help Drivers Save Money, Stay Safe
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, AutoNation, Inc. (NYSE:AN) is emphasizing the importance of proactive vehicle maintenance during National Car Care Month in April. The company's President of After-Sales, Christian Treiber, highlights that preventive maintenance is crucial for enhancing safety, increasing fuel efficiency, and minimizing future repair expenses. Taking small maintenance actions now can significantly benefit vehicle owners both financially and in terms of safety. AutoNation encourages drivers to prioritize regular upkeep to ensure their vehicles run smoothly and cost-effectively.

data.title: Exzeo Group Sets 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders and Record Date
data.description: Exzeo Group, Inc. (NYSE: XZO) has disclosed plans for its 2026 Annual Shareholders Meeting scheduled for June 9 at 3:00 p.m. EST at the company's Tampa, Florida headquarters on 1000 Century Park Drive. Shareholders as of April 10, 2026, will have rights to attend and vote at the meeting. The agenda includes electing two Class A directors and ratifying other proposals.

data.title: Greenidge Generation Announces Expiration and Final Results of Exchange Offer for Senior Notes Due 2026
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE) disclosed the conclusive outcomes of its recent offer to swap its existing 8.50% Senior Notes due 2026 (referred to as the “Old Notes”). The exchange proposal was detailed in the Offer to Exchange, published on March 11, 2026. Greenidge, a vertically integrated firm concentrating on power generation for data centers and infrastructure expansion, revealed the final statistics related to the exchange offer but omitted specific numbers from the reports.

data.title: PUBLIC HEALTH ADVOCACY INSTITUTE (PHAI) TO HOST THE UNITED STATES' FIRST-EVER INTERNATIONAL SYMPOSIUM FOCUSED ON BRINGING COMPREHENSIVE PUBLIC HEALTH REGULATION TO THE ONLINE GAMBLING INDUSTRY
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Boston will host leading international experts to address the increasing prevalence of online sports gambling, prediction markets, and online casino platforms. This event aims to provide solutions to tackle the widespread issue, which poses a threat to public health globally. The gathering will involve professionals from various countries and industries, emphasizing the urgent need for action. The meeting comes as an opportunity to strategize and collaborate on effective measures.

data.title: Medicus Healthcare Solutions Publishes New Report on the Cardiologist Shortage
data.description: In Windham, New Hampshire on April 9, 2026, it is reported that the demand for cardiovascular services is on the rise in the United States, creating pressure on healthcare organizations to ensure access to cardiology care. With workforce limitations being a concern, healthcare leaders are scrutinizing the situation closely. This trend signifies the growing need for cardiac services, with a surge in patients seeking care. This has put strain on healthcare providers to meet the demand, emphasizing the importance of addressing workforce shortages in the medical field.

data.title: LPL Financial Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: In San Diego on April 09, 2026, LPL Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LPLA), the parent company of LPL Financial LLC, disclosed plans to release its first quarter financial outcomes on Thursday, April 30, post-market closure. A conference call to deliberate on the results is scheduled for 5 p.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: UDR, Inc. Named a Top Workplace by USA Today for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, was named a 2026 Top Workplace by USA Today and Energage for workplace culture and engagement. With over 1,400 associates, UDR had previously been honored as a Top Workplaces winner in the Real Estate Industry for 2024 and 2025, and as a 2025 Top Workplace Colorado. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment.
